mapper.select:
SELECT c.id, c.name, c.partner_id AS partnerId, c.currency_id AS currencyId, c.active FROM res_company c LEFT JOIN res_currency rcur ON rcur.id = c.currency_id LEFT JOIN res_partner rp ON rp.id = c.partner_id
AND ( c.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR rp.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR rcur.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR rcur.symbol ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') )
AND c.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.name}, '%')
AND rp.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.partnerName}, '%')
AND c.currency_id = #{query.currencyId}
AND ( rcur.name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.currencyName}, '%') OR rcur.symbol ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.currencyName}, '%') )
AND c.active = #{query.active}
ORDER BY c.id DESC
